zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
价格围绕0.165附近窄幅震荡，整体仍处于短线回调后的整理结构，均线压制明显，上方SMA20形成动态阻力，趋势偏弱但未破位下行，整体延续震荡格局运行

MACD维持负值区间，动能柱略有收敛但未翻正，短期空头动能占优；由于RSI缺失，但从价格波动看买盘持续性不足，信号仍偏弱势结构运行。

关键支撑位于0.1647低点，若失守可能下探0.1635区域；上方阻力集中在0.1663及0.1669一线，突破需成交量配合确认趋势

操作上建议区间交易为主，高抛低吸思路更稳健；若放量突破0.1669可短多跟进，否则仍以震荡偏空对待，严格止损控制仓位风险

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano against the US Dollar is currently moving within a tight consolidation band after a minor 24-hour uptick of 0.45%. Despite the slight recovery, price action remains subdued and largely range-bound between recent intraday extremes. The broader structure suggests a neutral-to-bearish bias as ADA struggles to sustain momentum above its short-term average. Market participants appear cautious, with liquidity concentrated near immediate support and resistance levels.

Technical indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD reading is negative at -0.00133, indicating persistent bearish momentum and limited bullish crossover strength. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation relies heavily on price structure and moving averages. Trading below the 20-period SMA at 0.16694 suggests ADA has not yet reclaimed short-term bullish control, and momentum remains slightly tilted toward downside pressure despite recent stabilization.

Immediate support is observed at 0.16471, aligning closely with the session low and acting as the first defensive zone for buyers. A break below this level could expose ADA to further downside drift toward psychological and structural support near 0.16400. On the upside, resistance is clustered around the 20-period SMA at 0.16694, followed by the intraday high of 0.166297, which now serves as a secondary barrier within the current range structure.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Long positions may be considered only on a sustained move above the SMA with volume confirmation, targeting continuation toward higher resistance zones. Conversely, rejection near resistance could justify short-term bearish setups with tight risk controls. Stops should remain close to support levels due to the narrow trading range and potential for quick volatility expansion.
